claims.evidence_text: in the seed guide it is not abnormal to encounter hard red spring varieties ranging from 34 to 44g TKW. This demonstrates a 30 per cent change in TKW.
claims.claim_summary: Hard red spring wheat varieties commonly range from 34 to 44 g thousand kernel weight.

claims.evidence_text: if each seed weighs on average, 0.03g, then one thousand seeds will equal 30g TKW. If each seed weighs 0.045g, the TWK is 45g.
claims.claim_summary: Illustrative wheat TKW values ranging from about 30 g (0.03 g/seed) to 45 g (0.045 g/seed).

claims.evidence_text: Variety B requires a seeding rate of 130.7lbs/ac to reach the desired seeding rate of 35 seeds/sqft.
claims.claim_summary: A target plant stand of 35 seeds per square foot is used as a desired seeding density for wheat.
